final_prompt.prompt:

Style/medium: single large knowledge card, cartoon illustration style, child-friendly
Composition: clear title at top, bullet-point key facts listed on the side with punctuation, main area filled with cartoon story scene
Subject: Battle of Red Cliffs (赤壁之战), Three Kingdoms story for children
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 赤壁之战
Constraints: single card layout, title must be clearly visible, key points listed and punctuated beside the illustration
Avoid:
